codeReview.summary: Manual scrutiny review passed. Reviewed the worker handoff for commit f1d2e79edb8f01876bdbde1fde88d3a5b6a28d19, validated the reported scope and verification evidence, and checked the committed diff shape for the feature. Updated `erp-domain/src/test/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/modules/accounting/service/AccountingServiceTest.java` to restore the missing JUnit 5 `Tag` import, removed the accidentally duplicated lower-half of `erp-domain/src/test/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/modules/inventory/controller/DispatchControllerTest.java`, and reconciled `erp-domain/src/test/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/modules/purchasing/service/PurchaseReturnServiceTest.java` with the current `PurchaseReturnService` constructor and present-day service contract by wiring the new `JournalEntryRepository` dependency, seeding a posted-purchase fixture, and replacing stale assertions with current preview/unposted-purchase guard coverage. No production code or request/response shapes changed. Non-blocking follow-up remains limited to remote PR reruns or stale GitHub checks, not local code defects.

summary: Pass. Reconciled the propagated upper-stack test drift on the current recovery/07 head by removing the duplicate `DispatchControllerTest` block, restoring the missing JUnit `Tag` import in `AccountingServiceTest`, and realigning `PurchaseReturnServiceTest` with the current `PurchaseReturnService` constructor and fail-closed guards. The stack now compiles cleanly again and local `gate-fast` passes from this baseline.
